stemHtml: Which of the following conditions can you expect if the weather reports mention "low-level atmospheric divergence".

options.a: Increased surface pressure and cloud formation within the rising vertical currents, and atmospheric divergence close to the tropopause.
options.b: Reduced surface pressure, clouds dissipating due to the sinking vertical currents, and atmospheric convergence close to the tropopause.
options.c: Increased surface pressure with a possible inversion due to the sinking vertical currents, and atmospheric convergence close to the tropopause.
options.d: Reduced surface pressure, with clouds forming in the rising vertical currents, and atmospheric divergence close to the tropopause.
